title: Cache miss storm on product catalog
description: Product page requests spike latency after a cache warm-up job failed.

logs.message: Cache warm-up job failed at startup: key preload did not run
Cache miss rate is 92% on product reads; falling back to database
Search index healthy: query latency stable

alerts.message: catalog-service cache warm-up failed and cache miss rate above 90%

ground_truth.correct_fix: Manually trigger the cache warmup job to repopulate the catalog cache. Investigate why the scheduled warmup failed — check job logs for errors. Add a startup check that preloads the cache on pod initialization. Set up an alert for cache hit rate dropping below 80% to detect this earlier.
